feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: F1519 "Schedule Billing Creation" app: can a custom field (e.g. invoice value) be added?
entry.content:
I would like to add a custom field to the invoice data selection criteria of the app F1519 "Schedule Billing Creation". The goal is to only pick documents with value zero and create billing documents automatically.

The selection criteria looks like a "Fiorized" VF06 which from my GUI-days experience could only be extended via enhancement points. Also SAP Guided Answers say that the app has the type "SAP Fiori: Generic Job Scheduling Framework" which cannot be extended. However, in the Extensibility section of the Fiori Reference library the option "Extensibility via SAPUI5 Adaptation Projects" is mentioned. 

Does anybody have an experience extending such Fiori apps?

entry.title: Not option of Country- India in "Mass Upload Utility" app for HSN Creation at Private Cloud,
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

We are trying to create HSN code at  at Private Cloud by using  "Mass Upload Utility" app, there is not option of Country "India", How to add Country Country "India" while uploading HSN master ?

Thanks,

Ganesh Bhosale
@Ganesh_Bhosale555 ; @suhas_barge ; @kriti_daga

entry.title: Extend My Inbox Purchase Order Item in Private Cloud Edition 2023 FPS01
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

We have a Private Cloud Edition 2023 FPS01 system and want to extend Purchase Order Item in My Inbox app. I extended C_PurOrdItemEnh view for that. I also cleaned metadata cache and app cache. But we couldn't see the fields neither in line items as default or detail page. Annotations are as follows. 

  @ui.lineItem: [{
            qualifier: 'PurchItem',
            position: 125,
            importance: #HIGH }, {
            position: 125,
            importance: #HIGH
            }]
  @ui.fieldGroup: [{
           qualifier: 'ItemDetails',
           groupLabel: 'Item Details',
           position: 50,
           exclude: false,
           importance: #HIGH,
           value: 'ZZ1_WBS_PDI' }]
  @ObjectModel.readOnly: true
  _ItemExtension.ZZ1_WBS_PDI,
  @ui.lineItem: [{
            qualifier: 'PurchItem',
            position: 130,
            importance: #HIGH }, {
            position: 130,
            importance: #HIGH
            }]
  @ui.identification:{ position: 17, importance: #HIGH}
  @ObjectModel.readOnly: true
  _ItemExtension.ZZ1_WBS_Description_PDI

I tried different version of annotations but we couldn't see them. We just see them in view settings tab in line items. You can see it as follows.

I extended C_PurchaseOrderFs to try to see if it comes to My Inbox PO header. It was came. I also extended My Inbox app for PR and PR items. It was also came. 

Is there any solution for that problem? Or is there a step I'm doing wrong? 

Thanks in advance for any input.

Berk.

entry.title: About the Customer Onboarding Form
entry.content:
Hello everyone,
Our customer’s license is XXS, and as you all know, this license model does not include a separate QA system.

Since the SID information for the QA system is written as a separate system on the Customer Onboarding Form (COF), the form was not accepted on the TDD Assignment side, and they have requested a correction.

The question I would like to ask you is:
Do we have the possibility to correct the COF form created for the customer? If yes, I would appreciate your guidance on how to proceed.

Note: I also tried creating the form from scratch, but it did not ask for any system-related information on that form.

Thank you in advance for your help and support.

entry.title: SAP S/4 HANA Private Cloud Edition - MPLS Questionnaire
entry.content:
Hello All,

Our customer will use MPSL connectivity for their new SAP S/4 HANA Private Cloud Edition. On the Onboarding Form, within the Templates, we can see that there is 2 questionnaire documents, one being MPLS Questionnaire Clou4C and the other being Cloud4C VPN Questionnaire.

In order to complete S2D process, should we provide both of these documents to the related SAP experts or should we specificaly share only one of them?

Thank you.

entry.title: S/4HANA On Premise Fiori App Custom field BAPI_PO_CHANGE
entry.content:
Any moderator that can delete this message? I don't see a delete option anywhere.

Sorry.

entry.title: Handling Import Tariffs on Steel Products in SAP (USA – March 2024)
entry.content:
The U.S. government has announced that new import tariffs on steel products will take effect starting March 12, 2024. Some of the products exported by our company may be affected, and we need to understand how to handle these tariffs within SAP. We're shipping from Germany to a customer in the US. Occasionally, we also ship to one of our own plants in the US. We're not using GTS.

We are looking for best practices or relevant SAP functionalities to manage import duties effectively. Specifically, we would like to know:

  • How to configure import tariffs/customs duties in SAP (e.g., in SAP SD, MM)?
  • Whether there are OSS Notes or SAP recommendations regarding this topic?
  • How similar cases have been handled in S/4HANA?

If anyone has experience dealing with U.S. import duties in SAP, your insights would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Pre-delivered templates not available in App ''Maintain Email Templates'
entry.content:
When calling the app 'Maintain Email Templates', in the pre-delivered tab, we cannot find the following templates for the quotation management:

  • New approval request: SD_SLS_QTN_APPROVAL_EMAIL_TMPL
  • Approval reminder: SD_SLS_QTN_DEADLINE_EMAIL_TMPL
  • Document release: SD_SLS_QTN_RELEASE_EMAIL_TMPL
  • Document rejection: SD_SLS_QTN_REJECT_EMAIL_TMPL
  • Document rework request: SD_SLS_QTN_REWORK_EMAIL_TMPL

Is there a way to upload them? Should we create them from scratch via SE80?

entry.title: SAP Convergent Mediation Private Cloud (BRIM) - OAuth 2.0
entry.content:
Hi,

Could you please confirm if Convergent Mediation integrations support OAuth 2.0? Additionally, OAuth 2.0 require a specific SAP license (SKU), or is it included in the standard license for SAP Convergent Mediation DigitalRoute Cloud, Private Edition?

Thanks in advance for your help.

Best regards,

entry.title: Implementation of New ISD Rules applicable from 1st April 2025
entry.content:
ISD implementation in GST India Solution


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: DDA tool access is rejected
entry.content:
Hi Team.

I am trying to access DDA tool with my registered S-User ID. and i get to a point to click on the link to access the tool. But, i land up on the page saying 'Your request is rejected. In case you disagree, reach out via email.' Any idea what the reason could be the possible reasons? my other colleagues are able to access.

entry.title: Has anyone used PPOME Organization Structure in Flexible Workflow?
entry.content:
I have a scenario where the customer uses PPOME extensively to support workflows.

Currently, they are on version 1909 and still use Release Strategies for PRs and POs. However, they are interested in flexible workflow and want to give it a try as part of the 2023 upgrade.

The challenge is that they are not willing to let go of PPOME and require it to be used for flexible workflow. As we all know, flexible workflows use employee BP setup (including the HR mini-master setup and sync, etc.).

I’ve explored using teams and responsibility management, including custom responsibility rules, but it is a lot of work to replicate their org structure. I’m not inclined to go this route as I envisage maintenance would be a pain. 

Any ideas? Has someone done this successfully?

entry.title: EWM-warehouse order - PICK LIST Config for custom form template in private cloud
entry.content:
Hi folks,

Is there any business rule existing for EWM - PICK LIST in OPD transaction in private cloud . We also checked the BRF+ xml file provided by SAP in note 2248229 but there is no xml file specific to warehouse order.

we are struggling to config the forms created in Maintain Form Templates app for pick list.

this pick list is generated when we are creating a warehouse order.

is there any other way to config the forms other than OPD transaction and if we need to use OPD then what is the respective BRF+ xml file for that?

 

please help.

thanks

entry.title: PCE / AWS Connectivity qestionnaire/Transit Gateway Questions
entry.content:
トランジットゲートウェイを使用してPCE(AWS)と顧客環境に接続しようとしています。

「AWS Connectivity qestionnaire」でトランジットゲートウェイのVPC IDに回答する必要がありますが、これについて質問があります。

Q1: PCE AWSと通信するVPCが複数ある場合、すべてのVPC IDを提供する必要がありますか?
Q2: お客様のAWS VPCを追加するなど、設定に変更があった場合、PCE側で追加の設定が必要になりますか?

entry.title: PCE / AWS Questionnaire/Transit Gateway Questions
entry.content:
I trying to connect PCE (AWS) to a customer environment using a transit gateway.

I need to answer the VPC ID of the transit gateway in the "AWS Connectivity qestionnaire", but I have a question about this.

Q1: If there are multiple VPCs that communicate with PCE AWS, do I need to provide all VPC IDs?

Q2: If there are any changes in the configuration, such as adding a customer AWS VPC, will additional configuration be required on the PCE side?

entry.title: SAP S4 HANA New O/P management replace idocs with APIs
entry.content:
Hi,

We have our current solution based on idocs, where in we send the billing documents from SAP to third party system. Biztalk is the middleware, which transforms the idoc details and sends it in XML format.

We are exploring the options of replacing the idocs with API and check the feasibility of using new S4 HANA new output management.

Has anyone explored this option ? Kindly share your thoughts.

Thanks

entry.title: How to extend the SAP Gateway log in TCODE /n/IWFND/ERROR_LOG
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We would like to confirm if there is a way to extend the log duration of the SAP Gateway log in the Tcode /n/IWFND/ERROR_LOG.

Currently, we can only check the error log for one day and it seems impossible to check logs from the past days.

Would it be possible to configure the log duration for this Tcode and make it possible to refer to logs from the past days?

Thank you in advance.

Fujita

entry.title: Can Rapid FP&A be used with S/4HANA 2022 On-Premise, and how to configure Standard CDS?
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I am currently working on implementing Rapid FP&A in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) with S/4HANA 2022 On-Premise. The documentation I’ve come across primarily mentions SAP S/4HANA Public & Private Cloud Editions, but I haven’t found clear guidance for S/4HANA On-Premise.

My Key Questions:
Can we use the Rapid FP&A Suite with the 2022 On-Premise version of S/4HANA?
The documentation and resources mention connectivity primarily for cloud editions, and I would like confirmation on whether the suite is compatible with on-premise.
Steps to Configure Standard CDS Views for On-Premise:
I am trying to configure the Standard CDS (for example, GLAccountBalanceFlowQuery found in the SAP_FI_FPA_IM_S4FinancialPlan model) in our on-premise S/4HANA environment.
We are facing issues, such as permissions errors and inability to refresh queries, which seem to be cloud-related setups. However, we are on S/4HANA On-Premise 2022.

I've looked for existing Standard CDS views related to FP&A in our on-premise system, but I haven't found relevant resources specific to on-premise.
Encountered a permission issue with GLAccountBalanceFlowQuery during refresh attempts (attached error).


Can the community help clarify whether the Rapid FP&A suite can be used with S/4HANA On-Premise?
If so, could you guide me through the steps required to configure the relevant Standard CDS views (or build custom ones) for FP&A models on-premise?
Any detailed steps, documentation, or guidance would be highly appreciated!

Thank you in advance for your help.

entry.title: AFC- Standard Closing Comprehensive list for Manufacturing industry
entry.content:
Our client is interested in understanding the best practices for AFC in the manufacturing industry and identifying key tasks to consider while re-engineering their ECC-based Excel tasks for migration to AFC-S/4HANA Cloud. While SAP provides standard tasks, our primary focus is on obtaining a comprehensive list of manufacturing-specific tasks to establish a new AFC template.

Any pointers /guidance will be helpful

entry.title: Please help me to understand the integration process required for Material Ledger in a 2-Tier system
entry.content:
Dear Team

Please help me to understand the integration process required for Material Ledger in a 2-Tier system

2 Tier system, One with SAP S/4 HANA Public cloud and another with S/4 HANA Private cloud.

  1. How does the Material Ledger manage intercompany transactions and transfer pricing in a 2-tier system?
  2. What are the challenges and solutions for synchronizing Material Ledger data between the Private Cloud and Public Cloud in a 2-tier system?

Thank you in advance!
